# setCellsStyleMask(_:)

**Instance Method**

Defines the appearance style of the cells.

## Declaration

```swift
func setCellsStyleMask(_ mask: Int)
```

## Parameters

- **mask**: An integer bit mask.   A mask can be specified by combining any of the options described in [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/1564248-cell-appearance-style-masks] using the C bitwise `OR` operator.

## Setting the Appearance

- **cellsStyleMask()**: Returns the appearance style mask for the cell.
- **setConstrainsToOriginalSize(_:)**: Sets whether the receiver constrains the cell’s image to its original size.
- **constrainsToOriginalSize()**: Returns whether the receiver constrains the cell’s image to its original size.
- **setIntercellSpacing(_:)**: Sets the spacing between cells in the view.
- **intercellSpacing()**: Returns the spacing between cells in the view.
